title: Citation
doc_html:
CHAPTER 23.  LOUISIANA MERCURY RISK REDUCTION ACT

§2571.  Citation

This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Mercury Risk Reduction Act."

Acts 2006, No. 126, §1, eff. June 2, 2006.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 23.  LOUISIANA MERCURY RISK REDUCTION ACT
§2571.  Citation
This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Mercury Risk Reduction Act."
Acts 2006, No. 126, §1, eff. June 2, 2006.
